case_title: BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON vs. NABORS, WILBERT et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT -ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NABORS, WILBERT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON AS TO DEFENDANT NABORS, WILBERT DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $89.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NABORS, WILBERT

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
